items.name_en: Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
items.name_cn:
Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
The straw bag sways with scattered light spots, holding orange soda, flower skirt hems, and even a spontaneous journey to mountains and seas, firmly holding the ritual of summer in your hand

specs.rawTitle:
Weave the cicadas, sea breeze, and the whole of midsummer into the straw texture:
The straw bag sways with scattered light spots, holding orange soda, flower skirt hems, and even a spontaneous journey to mountains and seas, firmly holding the ritual of summer in your hand

items.name_cn:
CELINE 24ss|TEEN LOLA Woven Bag
Stunning the time ⏳ from CELINE TEEN LOLA
Pushing the 1960s retro style to the extreme, stunning appearance ✨
Just the right amount of sophistication, while also meeting capacity needs
- Iconic Monogram element
A must-have for autumn and winter wardrobes, giving an "old money" vibe get ✔️
- 20x11.5x5cm
- Extra-long shoulder strap 57cm
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld, a styling king 💯
- Triumph logo hardware + TRIOMPHE clasp + detachable adjustable shoulder strap, multiple carrying methods
Color: Woven Brown
Model: 119533

items.name_en: New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
items.name_cn:
New Arrival: CE Smile Bag for Spring/Summer 2026
CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LAGE
The classic memory, reborn!
Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a modern, minimalist, and sharp temperament. New Creative Director Michael Rider makes a surprise return with the "Smile Bag" for the Spring/Summer 2026 debut. Smooth, fine, and lustrous leather, saddle stitching, and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing this beloved name. Reinterpreting classic design through a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 124213
Dimensions: 36.5x12x19cm (Opening)

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
😐 to 🙂, CE Smile Bag returns refreshed!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LUGGAGE New Smile Bag
The classic of memory, returns with a fresh look!
👜Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a simple and sharp modern temperament. Creative Director Michael Rider made the "Smile Bag" a surprise return at the 2026 Spring debut. Smooth and lustrous leather, topstitching and piping create a soft and rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag". Reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123693
Size: Base 36x22x16cm
Opening 56cm
